Fresh Talks Planned Before Ceasefire Expires** | YES (talks planned) | HIGH confidence

signals.headline: Germany Annual Inflation Climbs to 2
signals.raw:
Germany Annual Inflation Climbs to 2.7% in March 2026, Highest Since Jan 2024 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's official inflation rate rose to +2.7% year-on-year in March 2026, up from +1.9% in February, confirming preliminary estimates and driven by a 7.2% surge in energy prices (fuel +20%, heating oil +44.4%) amid the Iran war.[1][2][3]  
This marks the sharpest increase since January 2024
